card_description: McKenna Brothers is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick refines his "2-Source" theory, identifying our world as a "projected mixture" or hologram of two hyper-realities: Form I (Palm Tree Garden/Heaven/Light) and Form II (Black Iron Prison/Hell/Night)."
